title: Migrate it-tracker from Google Sheets API to Prisma/Supabase
description: Full migration of all API routes and UI pages from Google Sheets as the data source to Prisma ORM with Supabase PostgreSQL. Goal is to delete src/lib/googleSheets.ts entirely.

revisions.summary: Session resumed. Assessed current state via grep. Remaining work identified.
Finished migrating users API, logger, reports UI, and API services. Deleted googleSheets.ts. All TypeScript errors resolved.

completed: Fixed: revalidateTag() 2-arg TS errors across multiple routes
Fixed: is_delay boolean type in tasks/route.ts
Fixed: assignee_id field reference in tasks/route.ts
Fixed: filterByDepartment() to handle UUIDs (assignee_id) in permissions.ts
lib/logger.ts - migrated to Prisma Log model

key_context.assignee_id: Comma-separated User IDs (UUID). filterByDepartment() now handles both email and UUID formats
key_context.revalidateTag: In this Next.js version, revalidateTag() requires 2 args (tag, profile). Use revalidatePath() only.
key_context.db_connection: SUPABASE_POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING for direct connections, SSL rejectUnauthorized=false required
key_context.logActivity: Migrated to Prisma Log model using uuid v7
key_context.logger_migration_note: Schema has Log table, so logger migrated successfully
